title: feat: add INFERENCEPORT_API_KEY to gen secrets
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Provisions the `INFERENCEPORT_API_KEY` that #12048 (3D model generation) marks required in `push-generation-secrets.mjs`.

- Adds the key to `gen.pollinations.ai/secrets/{dev,staging,prod}.vars.json` via `sops set` (minimal diff)
- Without it, `decrypt-vars` hard-fails "Missing required generation secrets" → blocks `npm run dev` on that branch and staging/prod deploys
- Verified locally: `trellis-2-low` (inferenceport, sync API) returns a valid 4.2 MB glTF binary; direct backend probe 200 in ~54s cold / ~24s warm

Unblocks the Trellis 2 provider for #12048.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Unlocking the 3rd Dimension
gist.blurb: Added the necessary secret keys to power up our upcoming 3D model generation feature. The hive is getting ready to build in 3D!
gist.summary: Provisioned the INFERENCEPORT_API_KEY across dev, staging, and prod environments to unblock the Trellis 2 provider for 3D model generation.
gist.impact: This resolves local development and deployment blockers, paving the way for the upcoming 3D generation API.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) holding a glowing key, unlocking a 3D wireframe cube or a glowing portal. The robot companion could be holding a blueprint, representing the infrastructure work behind the scenes.

A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head stands nearby holding a blueprint. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
